title: fix: update dashboards and docs for spore rebalance
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tuning the sensors
gist.blurb: Adjusted the dashboards and documentation to align with the latest tier definitions.
gist.summary: Updated Grafana dashboards and documentation to reflect the rebalanced Spore and Microbe tier allocations.
gist.impact: Ensures documentation and internal monitoring match the active tier configuration.
gist.visual_concept: The robot and bee mascot reviewing a large digital dashboard or chart. The scene represents calibration and monitoring.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art of the robot and bee mascot looking at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) dashboard screen with charts. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic.
